Bash(turso db shell kokomo "SELECT id, post_slug, parent_id, author_name, approved, substr\(content, 1, 60\) as content_preview FROM comments ORDER BY id" 2>&1)
Bash(turso db shell kokomo "DELETE FROM comments WHERE id = 9" 2>&1)
Bash(turso db shell kokomo "SELECT post_slug, COUNT\(*\) as count, SUM\(approved\) as approved_count FROM comments GROUP BY post_slug ORDER BY count DESC" 2>&1)
